samples.xml_description:
Implement an asynchronous FIFO, FIFO bit width and depth can be configured(parameter DEPTH = 16, parameter WIDTH = 8). The asynchronous FIFO structure is divided into several parts. The first part is dual-port RAM, which is used for data storage. Instantiate dual-port RAM as a submodule, The RAM ports are input wclk, input wenc, input [$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0] waddr, input [WIDTH-1:0] wdata, input rclk, input renc, input [$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0] raddr, output reg [WIDTH-1:0] rdata. The second part is the data write controller. The third part is the data read controller. The fourth part is the read pointer synchronizer. The read pointer is collected using the two-stage trigger of the write clock and output to the data write controller. The fifth part is the write pointer synchronizer, which uses the two-stage trigger of the read clock to collect the write pointer and output it to the data read controller. Write clock. Read clock. Reset signal. Write increment. Read increment. Write data. Write full. Read empty. Read data. Data width of FIFO. Depth of FIFO.

Implement dual-port RAM.

Implement dual-port RAM. Write clock. Write enable. Write address. Write data. Read clock. Read enable. Read address. Read data.

Define RAM memory.

RAM memory.

Implement write operation.

RAM_MEM[waddr] = wdata;

Implement read operation.

rdata = RAM_MEM[raddr];

Instantiate dual-port RAM.

Implement write and read pointers.

Write pointer. Read pointer. Write pointer buffer. Read pointer buffer.

Implement write pointer logic.

wptr = 0; wptr = wptr + 1;

Implement read pointer logic.

rptr = 0; rptr = rptr + 1;

Implement Gray code conversion for write pointer.

wptr_buff = 0; wptr_buff = wptr ^ (wptr >> 1);

Implement Gray code conversion for read pointer.

rptr_buff = 0; rptr_buff = rptr ^ (rptr >> 1);

Implement pointer synchronization.

wptr_syn = 0; wptr_syn = wptr_buff; rptr_syn = 0; rptr_syn = rptr_buff;

Implement full and empty conditions.

wfull = (wptr[3:0] == ~rptr_syn[3:0]) ? 1 : 0; rempty = (rptr[3:0] == wptr_syn[3:0]) ? 1 : 0;

Implement input and output connections.

wen = winc & ~wfull; ren = rinc & ~rempty;

Implement output data.

rdata = 0; rdata = RAM_MEM[raddr];

Implement write data.

wdata = 0; wdata = RAM_MEM[waddr];

Implement write address.

waddr = wptr[3:0];

Implement read address.

raddr = rptr[3:0];

Implement dual-port RAM.
